description_long: This hammer features a large, rectangular head made of a translucent, icy blue material, giving it a striking and unique appearance. The head is reinforced with metallic bands and studded with dark bolts, adding both structural integrity and a rugged aesthetic. The handle is cylindrical, dark brown, and appears to be wrapped or textured for improved grip, with ornate metallic elements at both ends. The striking faces of the hammer are flat and broad, ideal for delivering powerful blows, while the sides of the head are smooth and slightly beveled. Decorative metallic spikes and a blue gem-like accent are present at the base of the handle, enhancing its visual appeal. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and fantasy, making it suitable for display or use in themed urban environments.
description: A large, icy blue rectangular hammer with metallic reinforcements, a textured dark handle, and decorative spikes and accents. The design is both functional and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammer, highlighting the translucent blue head, metallic bands, and textured handle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flat striking face, central blue gem accent, and the alignment of the handle with the head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, emphasizing the other side of the blue head and handle details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the handle with its decorative metallic spikes and blue gem, as well as the width of the hammer head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, likely wood or composite, with a dark textured or wrapped surface and metallic decorative end cap.
attribute_head_type: Large rectangular sledge-type head made of translucent blue material, reinforced with metallic bands and bolts, featuring flat striking faces.
